description: Drill-down par activite course a pied. Cliquer un lien dans le tableau du haut pour zoomer sur une activite (set time range + variable). Le panel markdown en bas liste les prescriptions de toutes les seances.

panels.title: GPS Track by Velocity
panels.description: Track colored by speed (km/h). Green = slow, red = fast.

panels.title: GPS Track by Heart Rate
panels.description: Track colored by HR (bpm). Green = low, red = high.

panels.title: Time in HR Zones (%) - reference plan
panels.description: % time per HR zone (Garmin zones at time of recording). Target for Z2-strict easy runs: >75% Z2.

panels.title: Time in Power Zones (%) - computed from per-second
panels.description: % time per power zone computed on-the-fly from per-second ActivityGPS data. Garmin auto-FTP zones.

targets.query: SELECT 100.0 * count("Power") / $activity_end FROM "ActivityGPS" WHERE "ActivitySelector" = '$activity' AND "Power" >= $z1_pwr AND "Power" < $z2_pwr
SELECT 100.0 * count("Power") / $activity_end FROM "ActivityGPS" WHERE "ActivitySelector" = '$activity' AND "Power" >= $z2_pwr AND "Power" < $z3_pwr
SELECT 100.0 * count("Power") / $activity_end FROM "ActivityGPS" WHERE "ActivitySelector" = '$activity' AND "Power" >= $z3_pwr AND "Power" < $z4_pwr
SELECT 100.0 * count("Power") / $activity_end FROM "ActivityGPS" WHERE "ActivitySelector" = '$activity' AND "Power" >= $z4_pwr AND "Power" < $z5_pwr

panels.title: Heart Rate (bpm) with HR zone bands + prescribed target overlay
panels.description: Z1-Z5 bands (auto-populated from InfluxDB HRZones). Purple band = prescribed HR target. Dashed orange staircase = avg HR per step. Y-axis auto-fits HR + target union.

targets.query: SELECT "HeartRate" AS "HR" FROM "ActivityGPS" WHERE "ActivitySelector" = '$activity' AND "HeartRate" > 60 AND "DurationSeconds" <= $activity_end
SELECT "StepAvgHR" AS "Avg per step", "RowMarker" AS "_rm_avg" FROM "WorkoutTarget" WHERE "ActivitySelector" = '$activity' ORDER BY time ASC
SELECT "TargetLowBPM" AS "Target Low", "RowMarker" AS "_rm_low" FROM "WorkoutTarget" WHERE "ActivitySelector" = '$activity' ORDER BY time ASC
SELECT "TargetHighBPM" AS "Target High", "RowMarker" AS "_rm_high" FROM "WorkoutTarget" WHERE "ActivitySelector" = '$activity' ORDER BY time ASC
SELECT ("TargetLowBPM" + "TargetHighBPM") / 2 AS "Target middle", "RowMarker" AS "_rm_mid" FROM "WorkoutTarget" WHERE "ActivitySelector" = '$activity' ORDER BY time ASC

panels.title: Workout steps — prescribed vs executed
panels.description: One row per prescription step. TargetType=open means no HR target (e.g. tests, sprints). DurationS = prescribed duration (s). ActualDurationS = actual executed duration.

targets.query: SELECT "StepIndex", "IntensityType", "TargetType", "TargetLowBPM", "TargetHighBPM", "StepStartOffsetS", "DurationValueS", "StepActualDurationS", "Notes" FROM "WorkoutStep" WHERE "ActivitySelector" = '$activity' ORDER BY time ASC

panels.title: Pace (min/km) — lower = faster + avg per step
panels.description: Per-second pace (mm:ss/km). Lower on Y-axis = faster. Orange staircase = avg pace per step (1000/StepAvgSpeed, fetcher filters Speed>0.5 m/s to exclude pauses).

targets.query: SELECT 1000.0/"Speed" AS "Pace" FROM "ActivityGPS" WHERE "ActivitySelector" = '$activity' AND "Speed" > 0.5 AND "DurationSeconds" <= $activity_end
SELECT 1000.0 / "StepAvgSpeed" AS "Avg per step", "RowMarker" AS "_rm_avg" FROM "WorkoutTarget" WHERE "ActivitySelector" = '$activity' ORDER BY time ASC

panels.title: Power (W) with power zone bands + prescribed target overlay
panels.description: Z1-Z5 bands (auto-populated from InfluxDB PowerZones). Purple band = prescribed power target (empty if session targets HR only). Orange staircase = avg power per step.

targets.query: SELECT "Power" AS "Power" FROM "ActivityGPS" WHERE "ActivitySelector" = '$activity' AND "Power" > 0 AND "DurationSeconds" <= $activity_end
SELECT "StepAvgPower" AS "Avg per step", "RowMarker" AS "_rm_avg" FROM "WorkoutTarget" WHERE "ActivitySelector" = '$activity' ORDER BY time ASC
SELECT "TargetLowW" AS "Target Low", "RowMarker" AS "_rm_low" FROM "WorkoutTarget" WHERE "ActivitySelector" = '$activity' AND "TargetLowW" >= 0 ORDER BY time ASC
SELECT "TargetHighW" AS "Target High", "RowMarker" AS "_rm_high" FROM "WorkoutTarget" WHERE "ActivitySelector" = '$activity' AND "TargetLowW" >= 0 ORDER BY time ASC
SELECT ("TargetLowW" + "TargetHighW") / 2 AS "Target middle", "RowMarker" AS "_rm_mid" FROM "WorkoutTarget" WHERE "ActivitySelector" = '$activity' AND "TargetLowW" >= 0 ORDER BY time ASC

panels.title: Cadence (spm) with prescribed target overlay
panels.description: Healthy cadence depends on pace (170 spm at 7:00/km is OK). Purple band = target cadence (if prescribed). Orange staircase = avg cadence per step.

targets.query: SELECT "Cadence" * 2 AS "Cadence" FROM "ActivityGPS" WHERE "ActivitySelector" = '$activity' AND "Cadence" > 30 AND "DurationSeconds" <= $activity_end
SELECT "StepAvgCadence" * 2 AS "Avg per step", "RowMarker" AS "_rm_avg" FROM "WorkoutTarget" WHERE "ActivitySelector" = '$activity' ORDER BY time ASC
SELECT "TargetLowRPM" * 2 AS "Target Low", "RowMarker" AS "_rm_low" FROM "WorkoutTarget" WHERE "ActivitySelector" = '$activity' AND "TargetLowRPM" >= 0 ORDER BY time ASC
SELECT "TargetHighRPM" * 2 AS "Target High", "RowMarker" AS "_rm_high" FROM "WorkoutTarget" WHERE "ActivitySelector" = '$activity' AND "TargetLowRPM" >= 0 ORDER BY time ASC

SELECT ("TargetLowRPM" * 2 + "TargetHighRPM" * 2) / 2 AS "Target middle", "RowMarker" AS "_rm_mid" FROM "WorkoutTarget" WHERE "ActivitySelector" = '$activity' AND "TargetLowRPM" >= 0 ORDER BY time ASC

panels.title: Stride Length (m) + avg per step
panels.description: Per-second stride length (meters). Orange staircase = avg stride per step (StepAvgStride/1000).

targets.query: SELECT "Step_Length"/1000 AS "Stride" FROM "ActivityGPS" WHERE "ActivitySelector" = '$activity' AND "Step_Length" > 0 AND "DurationSeconds" <= $activity_end
SELECT "StepAvgStride" / 1000 AS "Avg per step", "RowMarker" AS "_rm_avg" FROM "WorkoutTarget" WHERE "ActivitySelector" = '$activity' ORDER BY time ASC

panels.title: Vertical Ratio (%) — target <7% + avg per step
panels.description: Vertical Ratio (vertical oscillation / stride length, %). <7% = good efficiency. Orange staircase = avg VR per step.

targets.query: SELECT "Vertical_Ratio" AS "VR" FROM "ActivityGPS" WHERE "ActivitySelector" = '$activity' AND "Vertical_Ratio" > 0 AND "DurationSeconds" <= $activity_end
SELECT "StepAvgVR" AS "Avg per step", "RowMarker" AS "_rm_avg" FROM "WorkoutTarget" WHERE "ActivitySelector" = '$activity' ORDER BY time ASC
SELECT "Vertical_Oscillation"/10 AS "VO" FROM "ActivityGPS" WHERE "ActivitySelector" = '$activity' AND "Vertical_Oscillation" > 0 AND "DurationSeconds" <= $activity_end
SELECT "Stance_Time" AS "GCT" FROM "ActivityGPS" WHERE "ActivitySelector" = '$activity' AND "Stance_Time" > 0 AND "DurationSeconds" <= $activity_end

panels.title: Avg HR per lap (drift = aerobic decoupling) + altitude
panels.description: Avg + max HR per lap (1 km). Altitude in light background to distinguish cardiac drift from topographic effort. X-axis = elapsed time.

targets.query: SELECT "Avg_HR" AS "Avg HR", "Max_HR" AS "Max HR" FROM "ActivityLap" WHERE "ActivitySelector" = '$activity' ORDER BY time ASC
SELECT "Altitude" AS "Altitude" FROM "ActivityGPS" WHERE "ActivitySelector" = '$activity' AND "Altitude" > 0 AND "DurationSeconds" <= $activity_end

panels.title: Splits per lap (km)
panels.description: Garmin auto-laps per km. First column 'Index' = order. Pace in mm:ss/km, Power in W, HR in bpm.

targets.query: SELECT "Index", "Distance" AS "Distance (m)", "Elapsed_Time" AS "Time", 1000.0/("Distance"/"Elapsed_Time") AS "Pace", "Avg_HR" AS "Avg HR", "Max_HR" AS "Max HR", "Avg_Power" AS "Avg Power", "Avg_Cadence"*2 AS "Cadence", "Ascent" AS "D+ (m)", "Descent" AS "D- (m)" FROM "ActivityLap" WHERE "ActivitySelector" = '$activity' ORDER BY time ASC

SELECT "temperature_c" AS "TempStart", "mid_temperature_c" AS "TempMid", "end_temperature_c" AS "TempEnd", "wbgt_estimated" AS "WBGT", "humidity_pct" AS "Humidity", "wind_speed_kmh" AS "Wind", "wind_gust_kmh" AS "Gusts", "apparent_temp_c" AS "FeelsLike", "cloud_cover_pct" AS "Clouds", "pressure_hpa" AS "Pressure" FROM "ActivityWeather" WHERE "ActivitySelector" = '$activity'

list.name: activity
list.label: Course a analyser
list.query: SHOW TAG VALUES FROM "ActivitySummary" WITH KEY = "ActivitySelector" WHERE "ActivitySelector" =~ /running/

title: 03 Activity Drill-Down
